pageContext.name: Hinata Hyuga (Wedding Ceremony Version)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse present the Hinata Hyuga (Wedding Ceremony Version) Collectible Figure!  From the anime series Naruto:Shippuden comes a new Naruto Girls Hinata Hyuga figure! Standing at 8.3' tall she is seen wearing her beautiful wedding dress when she married Naruto.  Don't miss your chance to add this Naruto figure to your anime collectibles display today!
